channel.title: Clam Bake Santa
channel.description: Daily haikus celebrating holidays and birthdays.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-21
item.description:
Summer Solstice
Golden rays embrace / Fields of flowers dance and sway / Nature’s bright delight.

World Music Day
Strings hum in the sun / Drums beat with hearts open wide / Voices dance like stars.

Father's Day
Gentle hands create / Laughter dances 'round the room / Hearts warm in the glow.

Happy Birthday Jean-Paul Sartre
Candles glow softly / Laughter dances through the room / Cheers lift hearts like kites.

First Quarter Moon
Silver crescent glows / Whispers of night’s soft embrace / Stars twinkle with joy.

Summer Solstice
Golden sun above / Fields of blooms in warm embrace / Laughter fills the day.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-20
item.description:
National Ice Cream Soda Day
Creamy swirls delight / Bubbles dance in tall glasses / Chilled bliss brightens smiles.

World Refugee Day
Warm hugs from afar / Colors of hope unite us / Hearts embrace the world.

Happy Birthday Errol Flynn
Laughter fills the room / Candles dance with warm soft light / Cake and cheer unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-19
item.description:
National Martini Day
Olive in the glass / Chilled whispers of gin delight / Cheers to joy today!

Juneteenth
Sunlight warms the field / Voices rise like sweet spring winds / Hope blooms in each heart.

Happy Birthday Blaise Pascal
Laughter fills the room / Cake and joy, sweet scents entwined / Time to celebrate!

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-18
item.description:
International Picnic Day
Blankets spread with care / Laughter dances in the sun / Sandwich dreams take flight.

National Splurge Day
Shimmering ribbons / Sweet treats dance on tables bright / Laughter fills the day.

Happy Birthday Paul McCartney
Lively tunes drift high / Melodies dance through the air / Joyous hearts unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-17
item.description:
National Eat Your Vegetables Day
Crisp carrots crunch bright / Garden greens in sunlit bowls / Flavor bursts with joy.

National Apple Strudel Day
Sweet apples nestled / Wrapped in warm, flaky layers / Cinnamon whispers.

Happy Birthday Igor Stravinsky
Joyful notes take flight / Strings and woodwinds intertwine / Sparkles fill the night.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-16
item.description:
National Fudge Day
Chocolate swirls cascade / Sweet aromas fill the air / Joyful hearts unite.

Fresh Veggies Day
Vibrant carrots crunch / Tomatoes burst with sunlight / Nature's feast awaits.

Happy Birthday Billie Holiday
Sweet notes fill the air / Joy dances in each heartbeat / Laughter wraps the day.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-15
item.description:
National Strawberry Shortcake Day
Juicy red berries / Layers of cream gently swirl / Sweet joy on the plate.

Smile Power Day
Joyful laughs abound / Faces lit with warm delight / Sunbeams in each smile.

Happy Birthday Edvard Grieg
Joyful notes arise / Pines sway with the soft music / Laughter fills the air.

New Moon
Soft clouds drift away / Stars twinkle in the still night / Hope blooms like new leaves.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-14
item.description:
Flag Day
Banners in the breeze / Joyful hearts and laughter ring / Unity shines bright.

National Strawberry Shortcake Day
Juicy berries shine / Fluffy clouds of whipped cream swirl / Sweet joy on each slice.

Happy Birthday Harriet Beecher Stowe
Crisp leaves twirl in air / Stories weave through warm sunlight / Voices rise with cheer.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-13
item.description:
National Weed Your Garden Day
Green leaves touch the sky / Soft earth yields to eager hands / Life blooms with each weed.

Sewing Machine Day
Bright threads intertwine / Whir of joy fills the cool air / Patterns join as one.

Happy Birthday William Butler Yeats
Golden leaves cascade / Whispers of a poet's dream / Laughter breezes in.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-12
item.description:
National Peanut Butter Cookie Day
Warm dough hugs my hands / Peanut butter scents the air / A cookie so sweet.

Red Rose Day
Crimson blooms unfold / Perfumed breezes gently sway / Joy in bright bouquets.

Happy Birthday Anne Frank
Candles softly glow / Laughter fills the bright room air / Hope blooms everywhere.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-11
item.description:
National Corn on the Cob Day
Golden kernels glow / Butter drips, sweet corn's embrace / Summer's taste unfolds.

Corn on the Cob Day
Golden kernels shine / Buttery bliss coats each bite / Sweet summer delight.

Happy Birthday Millicent Fawcett
Bright candles aglow / Joyful hearts sing sweet praises / Cake shared with delight.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-10
item.description:
National Iced Tea Day
Frosty glass in hand / Lemon slices swirl like sun / Sipping summer's ease.

Ballpoint Pen Day
Ink flows like river / Words dance on the soft paper / Dreams take flight today.

Happy Birthday Judy Garland
Velvet skies above / Sweet melodies dance with light / Heartfelt cheers abound.

Happy Birthday Maurice Sendak
Wild things dance and play / Imagination takes flight / Dreams stir in the night.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-09
item.description:
National Strawberry Rhubarb Pie Day
Fresh pie on the sill / Sweet-tart scents in the warm air / Crust and joy unite.

Donald Duck Day
Feathers bright and bold / Splashing in a sunny pond / Waddles full of glee.

Happy Birthday Cole Porter
Bright notes fill the room / Melodies dance like warm light / Cake and cheer abound.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-08
item.description:
World Oceans Day
Waves dance with the sun / Bright shells twinkle on the shore / Blue depths sing with joy.

National Best Friends Day
Sunshine warms the heart / Side by side, dreams take their flight / Friendship's sweet embrace.

Happy Birthday Frank Lloyd Wright
Designs like sunlight / Nature dances through the glass / Harmony in blooms.

Last Quarter Moon
Silver light whispers / Soft shadows dance in the night / Stars twinkle with joy.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-07
item.description:
National Chocolate Ice Cream Day
Cool scoop in my hand / Melting sweetly, rich delight / Chocolate dreams abound.

National Bowtie Day
Dapper ties arranged / Colors dance with bright sunlight / Style wrapped in pure cheer.

Happy Birthday Paul Gauguin
Colors dance and sway / Brush strokes of joy embrace life / Art blooms in warm light.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-06
item.description:
National Applesauce Cake Day
Cinnamon and spice / Applesauce hugs the warm cake / Sweet joy on each bite.

National Gardening Exercise Day
Hands deep in rich soil / Colors burst in joyful blooms / Nature’s song surrounds.

Happy Birthday Alexander Pushkin
Pages crisp and white / Words like stars dance in the night / Joy blooms in the light.

Happy Birthday Thomas Mann
Balloons sway and shine / Sweet laughter fills the warm night / Joy wraps like soft quilts.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-05
item.description:
World Environment Day
Leaves shimmer with dew / Whispers of life all around / Sunlight warms the earth.

National Gingerbread Day
Sugar spiced delight / Gingerbread houses arise / Frosting dreams take flight.

Happy Birthday Federico Garcia Lorca
Whispers of the moon / Songs weave through the nighttime air / Stars twinkle in joy.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-04
item.description:
National Cheese Day
Creamy wheels of joy / Savory bites bring delight / Cheese dreams melt away.

National Hug Your Cat Day
Purring on my lap / Whiskers twitch with joy and warmth / Furry love abounds.

Happy Birthday Angelina Jolie
Laughter fills the air / Candies shimmer like starlight / Joyous hearts unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-03
item.description:
National Egg Day
Sunny yolks delight / Whisking dreams in morning light / Eggs dance in the pan.

Repeat Day
Joyful laughter rings / Echoes of hearts intertwine / Memories replay.

Happy Birthday Josephine Baker
Sparkling candles glow / Laughter bubbles like ripe fruit / Joyful hearts unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-02
item.description:
National Rocky Road Ice Cream Day
Chocolate swirls cascade / Crunchy nuts and marshmallows / Scoops of joy abound.

National Rotisserie Chicken Day
Juicy, tender gold / Herbs and spices intertwine / Gathered hearts rejoice.

Happy Birthday Thomas Hardy
Candles flicker bright / Laughter fills the cozy room / Joy wraps all like spring.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-06-01
item.description:
National Hazelnut Cake Day
Warm cake cools on racks / Crushed nuts and sweet cream unite / Joyous bites to share.

World Milk Day
Cows graze on green fields / Creamy clouds swirl in bright bowls / Joy splashes like milk.

Happy Birthday Marilyn Monroe
Laughter fills the air / Soft cake glimmers with bright light / Candles spark pure joy.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-31
item.description:
World No Tobacco Day
Fresh blooms greet the dawn / Clear lungs breathe in bright, sweet air / Joyful hearts unite.

Happy Birthday Walt Whitman
Candles flicker bright / Pages turn with joy and light / Nature's cheer takes flight.

Happy Birthday Clint Eastwood
Old films play softly / Candles dance on the bright cake / Cheers to a great life!

Full Moon
Bright orb in the sky / Silver beams dance on the lake / Night wraps us in peace.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-30
item.description:
National Mint Julep Day
Mint leaves dance with sun / Cool sips in the warm daylight / Cheers rise, joy abounds.

National Creativity Day
Colors splash and twirl / Brushes dance on canvas bright / Dreams ignite the heart.

Happy Birthday Benny Goodman
Bright notes fill the room / Dancing feet in soft shadows / Joyful hearts unite.

Happy Birthday Mel Blanc
Voice of many charms / Laughter dances through the room / Sweet cake smiles abound.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-29
item.description:
National Coq au Vin Day
Rich red wine simmers / Tender chicken cradled warm / Herbs dance in the pot.

Put a Pillow on Your Fridge Day
Soft fabric on ice / Cool dreams of comfort and peace / Whispers of delight.

Happy Birthday John F. Kennedy
Gentle waves embrace / Candles flicker, dreams take flight / Laughter warms the night.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-28
item.description:
National Brisket Day
Smoky scents arise / Tender brisket, spice embraced / Feast of warmth and cheer.

National Hamburger Day
Grilled patties sizzle / Golden buns embrace the warmth / Ketchup rivers flow.

Happy Birthday Ian Fleming
Golden sunbeams glow / Crisp leaves dance on warm breezes / Cheers rise, hearts unite.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-27
item.description:
National Grape Popsicle Day
Grapes freeze in the sun / Violet dreams on my tongue / Chilled bliss, laughter hums.

Sun Screen Day
Sunlight warms my skin / Gentle waves embrace the shore / Laughter fills the air.

Happy Birthday Rachel Carson
Whispers in the leaves / Nature's voice sings to us all / Life's dance in the breeze.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-25
item.description:
National Wine Day
Grapes burst with sweet juice / Sunset hues in crystal glass / Laughter fills the air.

National Tap Dance Day
Wooden floors resound / Feet fly like whispers of joy / Rhythms twirl and leap.

Memorial Day
Flags wave in the breeze / Laughter dances on warm air / Sunshine hugs the day.

Happy Birthday Ralph Waldo Emerson
Whispers of the woods / Nature sings in soft sunlight / Ralph's thoughts dance like leaves.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-24
item.description:
National Escargot Day
Garlic butter melts / Soft shells bask in moonlit glow / A feast on the plate.

Brother's Day
Laughter fills the air / Handshakes, hugs, and smiles unite / Joy blooms like springtime.

Happy Birthday Bob Dylan
Songs drift through the air / Guitars strum with warm laughter / Joy blooms in each note.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-23
item.description:
National Taffy Day
Chewy, sweet delight / Colors swirl like rainbows bright / Joy wrapped in each bite.

Lucky Penny Day
Copper shines like sun / Children toss their wishes high / Joy springs from the ground.

Happy Birthday Margaret Fuller
Joyful laughter rings / Cake blooms with icing petals / Bright wishes take flight.

First Quarter Moon
Silver light spills down / Casting shadows on soft grass / Whispers of the night.

item.title: Clam Bake Santa — 2026-05-22
item.description:
National Vanilla Pudding Day
Sweet cream swirls and shines / Velvet smooth, a soft delight / Taste of dreams divine.

Sherlock Holmes Day
Magnifying glass / Whispers of London fog swirl / Mysteries unveiled.

Happy Birthday Arthur Conan Doyle
Mysteries unfold / Joyful tales in twilight glow / Laughter fills the room.

Happy Birthday Richard Wagner
Melody in air / Sunlight spills on the table / Joyful hearts unite.

Welcome to Gemini Season
Bright blooms gently sway / Whispers of breezes play soft / Stars laugh in the night.
